description_long: This elderly man has a tall, slender build with a pronounced stoop in his posture. His face is elongated, featuring a long white beard, deep wrinkles, and a bald head with a few tufts of white hair on the sides. He wears a loose-fitting, short-sleeved purple tunic with a black sash around his waist, paired with matching purple pants that are tucked into off-white socks and black shoes. His arms are thin and exposed, with visible veins and age spots, and his hands are extended forward as if gesturing or reaching. The clothing is simple and unadorned, with a slightly worn appearance, and the overall color palette is muted with purples, grays, and off-whites. The character's expression is stern and focused, giving him a wise and somewhat austere presence.
description: A tall, slender elderly man with a long white beard, bald head, and stooped posture, dressed in a simple purple tunic and pants with a black sash.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bald head, the black sash, and the loose purple clothing with tucked-in pants.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated face, long white beard, and extended arms with visible age details.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the stern facial expression, deep wrinkles, and the full length of the beard and outstretched hands.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, emphasizing the thin build, stooped posture, and the details of the tunic and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Loose-fitting short-sleeved purple tunic with a black sash, matching purple pants tucked into off-white socks, and black shoes; simple and unadorned.
attribute_posture: slightly hunched with arms extended forward
attribute_hairstyle: bald with short white hair on the sides
attribute_facial_features: long white beard, deep wrinkles, elongated face, stern expression
